Virat Kohli Stuns With Massive Sixes Ahead of IND vs SA 2nd ODI

Dec 3, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Virat Kohli and Rohit Stay Laser-Focused Amid External Noise

Virat Kohli set Raipur ablaze on Tuesday evening as the star batter unleashed a series of gigantic sixes during India’s intense training session ahead of the 2nd ODI against South Africa.
